master_style: MASTER STYLE: Vibrant, warm children's book illustration in soft digital painting style. Clean outlines with rich saturated colors. The shepherd is a warm brown-skinned Dominican man in his 30s with short black curly hair, a kind smile, wearing a simple white linen shirt, tan linen pants, and leather sandals. The sheep are fluffy, round, and cartoonishly adorable with big expressive eyes. The setting alternates between a lush Caribbean landscape with tropical palms, bright bougainvillea, turquoise skies, and rolling green hills, and a colorful Dominican village with vibrant painted homes in pink, yellow, and blue. 16:9 landscape format.
page_prompts: A wide peaceful Caribbean hillside bathed in golden afternoon light, dotted with exactly 100 fluffy white sheep scattered across bright green grass bordered by tropical palms and flowering bougainvillea. The warm brown-skinned Dominican shepherd stands tall in the center, arms open wide, smiling broadly at his beloved flock with pure joy and pride. Colorful Dominican village homes with bright pink and yellow walls are visible in the soft background. The mood is joyful, abundant, and full of love. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Close-up on the shepherd kneeling on the green hillside, his brow gently furrowed with concern as he counts sheep by tapping each fluffy head — his finger pointing as he silently mouths numbers. The sheep crowd around him curiously with big round eyes. His expression shifts mid-count to worried surprise, eyes wide, mouth forming a small 'O'. A thought bubble above him shows the number 99. Soft golden Caribbean sunlight filters through palm fronds overhead. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

The shepherd guides his 99 fluffy sheep into a safe, enclosed stone pen surrounded by lush tropical greenery and colorful flowering vines. He latches a warm wooden gate carefully, turning to look back at the flock with a reassuring nod and gentle smile. The sheep peek through the fence slats with curious big eyes. Tall green banana trees and a brilliant turquoise sky frame the scene. The mood is careful, responsible, and tender. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

The shepherd strides purposefully away from the stone pen and into the open Caribbean landscape, one hand shading his eyes as he scans the distance with determination. His white linen shirt billows slightly in the warm breeze and his sandaled feet step through tall bright green grass. The path ahead winds through tropical hills glowing under a warm sun, with wildflowers and palm trees lining the trail. His expression is focused and brave, full of quiet love. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A long winding path through the lush Caribbean landscape shows the shepherd walking through multiple terrains — dense jungle brush, a rocky riverbank, and a meadow of tall grass — all depicted in a flowing left-to-right panoramic scene. His expression moves from hopeful to tired but resolute, calling out with cupped hands around his mouth. Tropical birds scatter from the trees as he passes. Warm orange light hints at the sun beginning to lower, adding urgency and tenderness to the scene. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

The shepherd climbs a steep rocky hill on the left side of the image, gripping roots and stones with strong hands, sweat on his brow but determination in his eyes. On the right side, he peers down into a lush green valley below, hand cupped over his eyes, searching intently. The landscape is dramatically beautiful — emerald hills, cascading tropical vines, and a bright cerulean sky with puffy white clouds. The dual scene shows his tireless, loving effort across the whole landscape. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Nestled among the roots of a large tropical tree at the bottom of a sun-dappled ravine, one small fluffy white sheep sits alone looking slightly scared but unharmed, its big brown eyes wide and glistening. The shepherd bursts through the leafy brush into the clearing, his face transforming from exhausted worry into overwhelming relief and joy — arms already reaching forward. Warm golden light breaks through the tree canopy, spotlighting the sheep like a tiny miracle. The mood is tender, emotional, and triumphant. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

The shepherd kneels on the soft grass and wraps both arms around the fluffy sheep in a warm, joyful embrace, his face pressed gently against its woolly head with tears of happiness in his eyes and the biggest smile imaginable. The sheep nuzzles into his shoulder contentedly. Bright tropical flowers bloom all around them in yellows and pinks. Warm late-afternoon golden light floods the scene with a radiant, celebratory glow. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

The shepherd walks triumphantly down a winding tropical path toward the colorful Dominican village in the background, the fluffy sheep draped comfortably across his broad shoulders, its legs dangling and its face wearing a calm, happy expression. The shepherd grins ear to ear, one hand steadying the sheep, the other waving toward distant villagers who lean out of bright blue and yellow painted homes cheering and waving back. Warm sunset colors — deep orange, coral, and gold — fill the sky behind the village. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A warm, gently glowing scene shows the kind face of Jesus — a brown-skinned man with long dark wavy hair, warm brown eyes, and a soft white robe — sitting outdoors under a palm tree surrounded by a small group of children of various skin tones listening intently. Behind him, a soft illustrated vignette shows the silhouette of the shepherd carrying the sheep on his shoulders. Jesus gestures gently toward the children with an open hand, his expression radiating unconditional love. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A radiant, uplifting full spread image shows a diverse group of small children — including a warm brown-skinned Dominican girl with puffy pigtails and a bright yellow dress — each surrounded by a soft golden glow, scattered across different environments: a tropical hillside, a city street, a quiet room at night. Above them all, large warm illustrated hands cradle the whole scene tenderly like a shepherd holding a lamb. Stars, tropical flowers, and light fill the borders. The mood is safe, loved, and profoundly hopeful. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.
